title: AgentEval RunManifest
description: Per-test reproducibility manifest per PRD FR39 + architecture L669/L896. Story 5.3 (2026-05-20) extended the ratified 7-field shape to a union of FR39 + epics.md L1502 + architecture L896. Phase-1 stability label: provisional.

library_version.description: agenteval version pinned to AgentEval.__version__ at run time.

suite_id.description: RF Listener v3 suite identifier (full_name of root suite).

redaction_policy_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of the active credential redaction pattern set at run time. Consumers verify the redaction policy in effect via this hash.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the run's first span (per FR39).

ended_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the run's last span (per FR39 + architecture L896; epics.md L1502 used `completed_at` — D-2 drift fix renamed to `ended_at` for ratified consistency).

agenteval_tier_breakdown.description: Count of spans per `_agenteval_tier` value (e.g., {"1": 12, "2": 3, "3": 1}) per Story 1b.2 M_R5 ratification.

adapter_name.description: Name of the CodingAgentAdapter that drove the run (e.g., "GenericAdapter").

adapter_version.description: Version of the adapter at run time (typically the package version).

model.description: Model identifier passed to the provider (e.g., "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6").

mcp_servers.description: List of MCP servers the run was configured with (per FR39 "MCP server versions/SHAs"). Phase-1 carve: `version_or_sha` is "<TBD Phase-1.5>" pending DF-5.3-S2.

total_cost_usd.description: Sum of provider-reported cost across the run (USD).

mcp_coverage.description: AgentRunResult.metadata.mcp_coverage projection per FR36b + ADR-016 D1 3-value Literal.

warnings.description: DegradedTraceWarning messages collected during the run (Story 5.4 populates).

seed.description: RNG seed if explicitly seeded for reproducibility (per FR39).

prompt_hashes.description: SHA-256 hex of each prompt the agent saw during the run (per FR39 "prompt hashes"). Phase-1: hashes the user prompt only; multi-turn full sequence is DF-5.3-S3.
